mapper.update: UPDATE MSP_DIS_APD /*DisCus_SQL.updateApdProcT*/ SET PROC_YN = 'T', PROC_ID = 'BATCH4', PROC_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE 1 = 1 AND PROC_YN = 'N' AND REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} || '000000' AND #{endDt} || '235959' AND (EVNT_CD <> 'NAC' OR (EVNT_CD = 'NAC' AND CONTRACT_NUM IS NOT NULL AND RVISN_DTTM IS NOT NULL))
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MSP_DIS_CUS_HST /*DisCus_SQL.insertCusHst*/ ( REGST_DT, CONTRACT_NUM, REG_SEQ, EVNT_CD, EVNT_TRTM_NO, EVNT_TRTM_DT, PRMT_ID, EFFECTIVE_DATE, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, OPEN_AGNT_CD, PRMT_AGNT_CD, RATE_CD, ON_OFF_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE, SLS_TP, SLS_NO, MODEL_ID, MODEL_NM, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM )
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REGST_DT, CONTRACT_NUM, APD_SEQ AS REG_SEQ, EVNT_CD, NULL AS EVNT_TRTM_NO, '' AS EVNT_TRTM_DT, PRMT_ID, REGST_DT AS EFFECTIVE_DATE, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, OPEN_AGNT_CD, PRMT_AGNT_CD, RATE_CD, ON_OFF_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE, '' AS SLS_TP, '' AS SLS_NO, '' AS MODEL_ID, '' AS MODEL_NM, 'BATCH4' AS REGST_ID, SYSDATE AS REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_DIS_APD WHERE 1 = 1 AND PROC_YN = 'T' AND REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} || '000000' AND #{endDt} || '235959' AND PRMT_ID IS NOT NULL
UNION
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REGST_DT, CONTRACT_NUM, TRG_FNL_INF_SEQ AS REG_SEQ, EVNT_CD, EVNT_TRTM_NO, EVNT_TRTM_DT, PRMT_ID, EFFECTIVE_DATE, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, OPEN_AGNT_CD, PRMT_AGNT_CD, RATE_CD, '' AS ON_OFF_TYPE, '' AS OPER_TYPE, '' REQ_BUY_TYPE, SLS_TP, SLS_NO, MODEL_ID, MODEL_NM, 'BATCH4' AS REGST_ID, SYSDATE AS REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_DIS_TRG_FNL_INF WHERE 1 = 1 AND PROC_YN = 'T' AND REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} AND #{endDt} AND RSLT_CD = '0000' AND PRMT_ID IS NOT NULL
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO /*DisCus_SQL.updateRequestDtlPrmtID*/ MSP_REQUEST_DTL RD USING ( SELECT BB.CONTRACT_NUM, BB.PRMT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC, ORDER_NO) AS RNK, AA.ORDER_NO, AA.CONTRACT_NUM, AA.EVNT_CD, AA.PRMT_ID, AA.EFFECTIVE_DATE FROM (
SELECT 1 AS ORDER_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, EVNT_CD, PRMT_ID, REGST_DT AS EFFECTIVE_DATE FROM MSP_DIS_APD WHERE 1 = 1 AND PROC_YN = 'T' AND REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} || '000000' AND #{endDt} || '235959' AND CONTRACT_NUM IS NOT NULL
UNION
SELECT 2 AS ORDER_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, EVNT_CD, DECODE(RSLT_CD, '0010', NULL, PRMT_ID) PRMT_ID, EFFECTIVE_DATE FROM MSP_DIS_TRG_FNL_INF WHERE 1 = 1 AND PROC_YN = 'T' AND RSLT_CD IN ('0000', '0008', '0010') AND REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} AND #{endDt} ) AA ) BB WHERE RNK = 1 ) PI ON (RD.CONTRACT_NUM = PI.CONTRACT_NUM) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET RD.DIS_PRMT_ID = PI.PRMT_ID , RD.RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE

UPDATE MSP_DIS_APD /*DisCus_SQL.updateApdProcY*/ SET PROC_YN = 'Y', PROC_ID = 'BATCH4', PROC_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE 1 = 1 AND PROC_YN = 'T' AND REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} || '000000' AND #{endDt} || '235959'
UPDATE MSP_DIS_TRG_FNL_INF /*DisCus_SQL.updateFnlInfProcY*/ SET PROC_YN = 'Y', PROC_ID = 'BATCH4', PROC_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE 1 = 1 AND PROC_YN = 'T' AND REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} AND #{endDt}
